title: December 15th, 2021
body:
lyrics

i'm going like owen knowing he owe em
open a door duck in and close it
oh man that was a close one
i mean it, i'm leavin like steven
even though it's over it's nothing you're even
he don't even wanna be in the same air that your breathing
i'm dipping like pippen
in it for the winning but it's been a minute and life isn't fiction
i'm trying to rhyme like ashima climb between tha lines
you can't see when you read em from a decline
i'm a leaper inclined to fly through the ether
finger stretcher if there's a ledge or a crevasse
i bet i can catch it
believer in my ability to breathe through the either
or
i'm squintin like quentin with a missin prescription
sweepin the floor to fix my vision
cuz i can't afford to be sure what this is
i'm pitchin like hitchens scratchin my itches at that man's expenses
i'm callin y'all all in to watch me fall in like colin
i meant it like bennett
in it like emmett
til it like willit
then it's all kenneth
feeling like phillip's head
everyone's screw
pissed off everyone's crew like kristoff
what'd he do, that's old news, i turned it off
then i forgot my name
now you could get lost

civilization 6

victories

prince

small

hammurabi

diplomatic

1909

2214

pedro

culture

1870

1603
